title: Glitch Title Frame
description: Glitch Title Frame is an editable video template with a cyber visual system, reusable brand controls, and polished sample content.

source.name: iPolloWork · HTML Anything
source.attribution: Adapted from HTML Anything / frame-glitch-title; visual system and editable variables added by iPolloWork.

applyChecklist: Replace all sample copy with the user's complete brief.
Replace the iPolloWork demo logo through the editable brand slot when needed.
Apply the selected palette through declared variables without breaking the template hierarchy.
Keep the cyber visual language and video composition coherent.
Verify responsive layout, links, overflow and editable text before finishing.
